metadata.description: Jack's custom agent skills for Claude

plugins.name: data-modeler
plugins.description: Interactive data modeling skill for relational databases. Walks through requirements, schema analysis, normalization, review, ERD preview, and migration generation.

plugins.name: voice-writer
plugins.description: Writes in a personalized voice and style. Drafts messages, proposals, announcements, articles, and other text matching the author's tone, vocabulary, and formatting preferences. Includes banned phrase enforcement, content type routing, and self-review critic loop.
